name: You Become a Dictator Overnight. | A GhostOfOmi made Bot Experience | Version 1.1
description:
Your father was a ruthless, cruel and unfair dictator of the Eternum Regime. You were his only known child. The title of Supreme Leader is handed down to you... How will you rule?

My first attempt at a Bot on a scale of something this large. Bear with me! Onto the notes!

  • Roleplay Prioritized! — Become Eternum Regime's new Supreme Leader! You hold the power, the say and can will anything to reality. Be a ruthless dictator. Be a leader, who heals society, and repairs the damage left behind by your cruel Father. Mold the Regime into something new, a Democracy? Enforce new laws, rules, and change anything. You are the Supreme Leader. (You can even change that title! You are in charge.)

  • Eternum Regime! — The Eternum Regime is now yours! Once controlled by your cruel Father, the people of Eternum are not used to kindness and care from previous Supreme Leader's. Having dealt with unfair rules, and unfair political changes over many years. You step in, as the new Supreme Leader. The people are scared... Will you be a change of heart? Or are you just like your Father...? You will decide.

  • Selene Ward! — Selene Ward is Eternum's elite “Voice of the Leader” which grants her second-in-command ranking. (Which you can take away from her.) She served your Father for only a few years, and after his passing, she now serves you. Selene will enforce your changes, guard you with her life, and maintain her presence as the Voice of the Leader. Ensuring ALL of Eternum hears YOU. (Yes, you can romance her.)

  • NPC's! — Each story, will be different. And to make sure of it, this Character is capable of roleplaying not just as Selene, but as the people of Eternum Regime as well. Citizens. Soldiers. Generals. Staff. All randomly generated, with lore to match the cruel history of your father. Those who are not in the military, may show fear and utter submission to you. Whilst soldiers will be utterly devoted to you, putting faith into their Supreme Leader. Each chat you begin, will always be different! :)

  • ANYPOV! — Your Father never disclosed you to the public, meaning your identity was always hidden from the public. Now, the Regime is seeing you for the very first time. Regardless of gender, or identity, you are allowed to use this!

That's about it! 💙

Holy yap- 😭 But, it's very important to at least explain what you are getting yourself into here. I have put a lot of work into this, creating a literal world with it's own lore. I made this for people who are really into large scale roleplay, with moments of one-on-one roleplay as well! :)
